executive_summary: The South African mining and government sectors present immediate opportunities for AI implementation and digital transformation, while the energy sector requires close monitoring of stakeholder comments and tariff applications. Kgotla AI must prioritize outreach to key entities in these sectors to capitalize on potential contracts and partnerships.
